scripts.build: bun run build:types && bun run build:js
scripts.build:js: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap=external --external @query-farm/apache-arrow --external vgi-rpc && bun build ./src/client-entry.ts --outdir dist --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=external --external @query-farm/apache-arrow --external vgi-rpc
scripts.build:browser-test: bun build examples/browser/main.ts --outdir examples/browser/dist --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=external
